text: A humorous scene of two storm troopers one with a normal pizza and one wit a large one.
A flat screen TV with a picture of a person jumping on it.
The bird is walking beside a bull with dark horns.
A single sink bathroom counter with light and mirror
There is a baseball game in progress in a stadium
A woman riding a peculiar looking bike across a street.
Slice of cake with berries on the side on plate next to cup of beverage.
A large airplane parked in the airport, boarding passengers.
A mixtures of broccoli and other veggies covered in sauce.
A couple of people sitting at a desk with a laptop computer.
